m1_0.member_id, m1_0.email, m1_0.name, o1_0.order_date, oi1_0.order_id, oi1_0.order_item_id, oi1_0.count, oi1_0.order_price, p1_0.product_id, p1_0.name, p1_0.price, p1_0.stock_quantity, o1_0.status from orders o1_0 join member m1_0 on m1_0.member_id=o1_0.member_id join order_item oi1_0 on o1_0.order_id=oi1_0.order_id join product p1_0 on p1_0.product_id=oi1_0.product_id where o1_0.order_id=? testcase.name: cancelAlreadyCancelledOrder
